changes.description: Flow tracing phase: FlowStep/FlowResult dataclasses, _is_entry_point() heuristic, trace_flows() with forward BFS through CALLS edges creating Process nodes and STEP_IN_PROCESS edges
11 tests covering dataclass fields, empty graph, single/multi entry points, max_depth, cycle handling, edge persistence, entry point detection heuristics
Imported FlowResult/trace_flows, added flows() method to ContextGraph, wired trace_flows into index() pipeline, updated __all__
Added cmd_graph_flows() with human-readable and JSON output, --max-depth flag, registered in _graph_cmds and dispatch
Added TestGraphFlows class with 5 tests: help, empty_repo, with_entry_points, json_output, max_depth
